description: Maxio provides subscription billing and revenue management software for B2B SaaS companies. It supports recurring and usage-based billing, subscription management, revenue recognition, and financial reporting workflows.
summary: Maxio exposes a documented Advanced Billing REST API authenticated with per-site API keys over HTTP Basic Auth, plus a Maxio.js browser integration surface whose credential is documented but public auth mechanics/details are not fully accessible; Maxio markets an MCP offering but does not publish a connect endpoint or developer integration docs for it.
